name: Creamy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 each chicken breast halves without skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the chicken in a 9 x 13 baking dish.
2. Top with cheese slices.
3. Combine the stuffing, wine and butter.
4. Spoon over the chicken breast.
5. Sprinkle with crushed stuffing mix.
6. Pour the melted butter over the crumbs.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 - 45 minutes.
